MaxLineLength:ClashYamlParser.kt$ClashYamlParser$val insecure = asBool(map["skip-cert-verify"]) == true || asBool(map["allow-insecure"]) == true || asBool(map["insecure"]) == true
MaxLineLength:ClashYamlParser.kt$ClashYamlParser$val proxies = (gm["proxies"] as? List<*>)?.mapNotNull { asString(it) }?.filter { it.isNotBlank() } ?: emptyList()
